item.title: The Heat is On With Huge Savings in Our Peak Summer Sale!
item.description: <![CDATA[Summer is heating up, and so is your Meta Quest library, thanks to all the great new deals you can snag as part of our Peak Summer Sale.]]>

item.title: GRAMMY Award Winner YUNGBLUD’s ‘Zombie’ Now Available in ‘Beat Saber’
item.description: <![CDATA[‘Zombie,’ YUNGBLUD’s deeply personal exploration of grief, is Beat Saber’s latest Shock Drop, and it’s available to play today.]]>

item.title: ‘VR Games Showcase’ June 2026 Recap: Every Meta Quest VR Game Announcement
item.description: <![CDATA[We’ve rounded up every Meta Quest game in the Summer VR Games Showcase to bring you up to speed on everything that’s coming to the Meta Horizon Store.]]>

item.title: Introducing Meta Glasses: A Range of New Styles from Meta and EssilorLuxottica, Starting at $299
item.description: <![CDATA[Today, in partnership with EssilorLuxottica, we’re introducing Meta Glasses. Building on all the technology and features of the world’s best-selling AI glasses, this new line features bold and timeless shapes, rich colors, and premium materials, all consciously crafted and starting at just $299.]]>

item.title: ‘VR Games Showcase’ Set to Show Off Big Upcoming Games on June 23
item.description: <![CDATA[Summer’s in full swing, and with a heap of new VR games on the horizon, it’s time for another VR Games Showcase to show off everything fans can look forward to coming to Meta Quest.]]>

item.title: Meta Lab Brings Hands-On AI and VR Experiences to Best Buy Stores Nationwide
item.description: <![CDATA[We’re excited to bring the Meta Lab retail experience to Best Buy with over 50 dedicated experiential Meta Lab spaces launching soon inside of Best Buy locations across the United States and in Canada.]]>

item.title: What to Play on Meta Quest: May 2026 Recap
item.description: <![CDATA[Each month, we round up all the biggest new releases and content updates so you can keep up with what’s happening on Meta Quest and what’s pushing the envelope in VR.]]>

item.title: New Games Join the Meta Horizon+ Catalog in June
item.description: <![CDATA[Rhythm, mystery, and a whole lot of personality — June’s Meta Horizon+ lineup has something for everyone.]]>

item.title: Take Flight and Explore the Unknown Skies of 'Compass,' Launching Today on Meta Quest
item.description: <![CDATA[‘Compass’ is an open-world VR flying adventure from Montreal studio TREBUCHET, the team behind Broken Edge, Winds & Leaves, and Prison Boss VR.]]>

item.title: ‘Beat Saber’ Celebrates Eight Years With Three Free Songs, Featuring a New In-House Track
item.description: <![CDATA[It’s time to cue the beat, lock into the rhythm, and slash notes to some heavy ‘Beat Saber’ tech-dance bass drops — with three free songs to play]]>
